artPrompt: A dim back room where a smirking goblin gangster slides a small wrapped parcel and a gleaming coin across a worn card table toward an unseen recipient, his clawed hand lingering just a beat too long, cigar smoke curling through a single pool of amber lamplight. Shadows swallow the corners, a second goblin watches from the dark. Mono-black noir of ink shadow and smoky brown, the menace of a gift that is a debt, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: An Offer of Good Faith
text:
Target opponent gains 4 life and you create two Favor tokens. Such generosity. Remember it.
Draw a card. (You can afford to be friendly. You've got it in writing.)
flavorText: "Consider it a gift. We don't give gifts. Consider it anyway."
